case_title: LILLIE DEGUZMAN et al VS. MR. GARY CHU et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, MR. GARY KAR TSUN LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 - SERVED FEB-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, MR. GARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEGUZMAN, LILLIE FRANCIS, DAWNNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, MR. GARY KAR TSUN LLC $2,476.76 PRINCIPAL, $184.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,661.26, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CC 1950.5 WHICH REQUIRES A GOOD FAITH ACCOUNTING OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OR THE RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WITHIN 21 DAYS AFTER THE TENANCY TERMINATES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
